name: Sphinx (Python Documentation Generator)

auth.notes: Local generator; ReadTheDocs hosting requires account

performance.notes: Build time seconds to minutes depending on project size

agent_readiness.notes: The standard Python documentation generator. reStructuredText (RST) or Markdown. Auto-generates API docs from docstrings (autodoc). Multiple output formats: HTML, PDF, EPUB, man pages. 400+ extensions including MyST (Markdown), Napoleon (Google/NumPy docstrings), intersphinx (cross-project linking). ReadTheDocs integration. Used by NumPy, Django, FastAPI, Python stdlib docs. MkDocs is simpler alternative.

gotchas: reStructuredText syntax less intuitive than Markdown
Build times can be slow for large codebases
best_when: Python library documentation with API reference generation
Large projects needing cross-referencing and multi-format output
summary: Sphinx is the standard Python documentation generator. Generates API docs from docstrings (autodoc). RST and Markdown (via MyST). Multiple output formats. 400+ extensions. ReadTheDocs integration. Used by NumPy, Django, FastAPI, and Python stdlib. The most powerful Python doc generator but complex configuration. MkDocs is simpler for Markdown-first projects.
